author: y4rr
content: Audit-Fix Phase 16 APPROVE. Added #[cfg(not(feature = wgpu))] #[doc(hidden)] pub fn XpuDevice::new_for_testing(ordinal). New stub-mode conformance test exercises xpu_add/relu/chebyshev/make_xpu_tensor and asserts Err(DeviceUnavailable). Runs with cargo test -p ferrotorch-xpu --no-default-features (24 conformance PASS, was 23+1 new). Default-feature build unaffected (cfg-gated).
